title: Gondwana Game Reserve: Big 5, fynbos, immersive conservation and luxury stays
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Gondwana Game Reserve is...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery\n Sponsored Content","html":"Gallery\n Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Gondwana Game Reserve is honoured to be named Best Hotel / Boutique Hotel in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Gondwana Game Reserve is honoured to be named Best Hotel / Boutique Hotel in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We are deeply grateful to the Mossel Bay community for recognising our commitment to world-class hospitality and conservation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For over 20 years, Gondwana has restored 11,000 hectares of former farmland into a thriving wilderness where endangered landscapes are protected, wildlife flourishes and guests experience the wonder of true safari living.","html":"For over 20 years, Gondwana has restored 11,000 hectares of former farmland into a thriving wilderness where endangered landscapes are protected, wildlife flourishes and guests experience the wonder of true safari living."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Every stay at Gondwana is more than a luxury getaway - it directly supports the conservation of endangered species, the restoration of fragile ecosystems and the empowerment of local communities.","html":"Every stay at Gondwana is more than a luxury getaway - it directly supports the conservation of endangered species, the restoration of fragile ecosystems and the empowerment of local communities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our success is made possible by a passionate team, a dedication to sustainability and the unforgettable experiences we create for our guests who return year after year to be part of our ongoing conservation story.","html":"Our success is made possible by a passionate team, a dedication to sustainability and the unforgettable experiences we create for our guests who return year after year to be part of our ongoing conservation story."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Contact us:"},{"type":"list","items":["+27 (0)44-333-0200","[email protected]","www.gondwanagr.co.za","Whatsapp +27 (0)63 402 2546","https://www.facebook.com/Gondwanagamereserve"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
